dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 5396 RH: Price Stability Act of 2026
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mr. Hill of Arkansas (for himself, Mr. Stutzman, and Mr. Donalds) introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Financial Services
Reported with an amendment, committed to the Committee of the Whole House on the State of the Union, and ordered to be printed
action.action-instruction: Strike out all after the enacting clause and insert the part printed in italic
For text of introduced bill, see copy of bill as introduced on September 16, 2025

form.official-title: To amend the Federal Reserve Act to remove the mandate on the Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System and the Federal Open Market Committee to focus on maximum employment.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Price Stability Act of 2026.
Section 2A of the Federal Reserve Act (12 U.S.C. 225a) is amended by striking maximum employment, stable prices, and inserting stable prices.

endorsement.action-desc: Reported with an amendment, committed to the Committee of the Whole House on the State of the Union, and ordered to be printed
